vars.document_text: The CaseGraph platform enables local-first document processing with BYOK provider support. It includes agent orchestration, knowledge retrieval via vector search, and workflow definitions for multi-step processing pipelines.

On March 15, 2026, Acme Insurance Corp. filed a regulatory update with the National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC). The update was reviewed by compliance officer Jane Smith and approved by the board of directors.
